name: Clutch Lanes & Sports Center
about: Clutch Lanes & Sports Center is a multi-venue entertainment center offering golf simulator bays alongside other recreational activities like bowling and volleyball. The golf facilities feature a Full Swing simulator system for head-to-head competitions and skill contests. The venue provides a modern, casual environment that combines sports entertainment with a full-service bar and kitchen, making it suitable for both casual play and organized events. Reservations are recommended to secure a bay, ensuring availability and a smooth experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Interactive Full Swing simulator technology for head-to-head play
Easy online reservation system to guarantee a bay
Integrated food and bar service available during play
Multi-sport venue offering variety and entertainment beyond golf

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available, with an extensive menu accessible for dine-in or takeout orders.

simulator_hardware.notes: Interactive golf simulator system for competition and skill challenges.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if they provide club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar on-site, but it does not explicitly mention a BYOB policy. Food and drinks can be purchased directly from the venue.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on a simulator usually takes about 1 to 1.5 hours, depending on the number of players and any skill challenges played.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Clutch Lanes & Sports Center is kid-friendly, offering activities like bowling and parties that cater to families and children.
